SELECT date_column, toRelativeMonthNum(date_column) AS months_elapsed FROM test_dates;
SELECT MAX(months) FROM (SELECT toRelativeMonthNum(date_column) AS months FROM test_dates);
SELECT date_column, toRelativeMonthNum(date_column) AS months FROM test_dates WHERE months > 120;
CREATE TABLE test_dates_extended (id UInt32, date_column DateTime);
SELECT id, date_column, toRelativeMonthNum(date_column) AS months_elapsed FROM test_dates_extended WHERE months_elapsed < 180;
SELECT AVG(months_elapsed) FROM (SELECT toRelativeMonthNum(date_column) AS months_elapsed FROM test_dates);
SELECT DISTINCT toRelativeMonthNum(date_column) FROM test_dates WHERE date_column >= toDate('2000-01-01') AND date_column <= toDate('2022-12-31');

SELECT d.id, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(toRelativeMonthNum(d.date_column)) AS total_months FROM test_dates_extended d JOIN test_dates t ON toRelativeMonthNum(d.date_column) = toRelativeMonthNum(t.date_column) GROUP BY d.id HAVING total_months > 100;
